meaning: n.木工艺,木工行业adj.干木工活的
examples: The first store excludes all woodworking products.
Art works, woodworking works anything that occupies your hands.
Painting, woodworking, sculpting, programming or blogging are all great starts.
In 2009, they bought the website CustomMade.com, which was focused just on woodworking products.
